title: opaque variable name is RFC 3986 jargon, not self-documenting
description: secretx-core/src/lib.rs line ~1108: variable named 'opaque' refers to RFC 3986 'opaque URI' concept which is correct but unknown to most readers. At this point it holds the backend:path string. Rename to 'backend_and_path' which is self-documenting without needing the comment above it.
